title: Trailer-Vision
description: Basically a 1:1 Modpack that recreates the Minecraft trailers style.
body:
![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/111629e038a610b283666ce6a864e90f11b9b38d_0.webp)
---

This modpack has been carefully developed to deliver a **high-quality trailer-style experience**. I noticed that many other modpacks trying to recreate this style always had **one element that didn’t quite match up**. That’s why I created this modpack—to bring the best possible experience for those aiming to recreate that authentic trailer look!

![Forest using modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d2ee758e9a697daf711207fb243cb9aa2c1f3fa.png)  
_Captured using the modpack!_

---

### Features include:
- Life-like camera (Camera Overhaul)
- Heavy optimization
- IPN/Inventory Profiles Next
- Custom UI/Sounds
- Custom Music
- Essential
- And much more!

---
